title: Headache for three days
description: You wake up with a strong headache. You go to the doctor to describe your symptoms and get advice.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Hello. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I have had a headache for three days.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Do you have a fever too?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: No, I have no fever.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Are you sleeping well?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: No, I can't sleep at night.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Take these pills twice a day.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Thank you very much, Doctor.

title: Ordering in a café
description: You sit at a Berlin café and want to order breakfast and coffee.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Good morning! What would you like?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I would like a coffee, please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: With milk and sugar?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Only with milk, please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Would you like something to eat too?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, I'll take a croissant.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: That's five euros, please.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Here you go. Keep the change.

title: Buying a jacket
description: You are in a clothing store and want to try on a jacket.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Can I help you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, I'm looking for a jacket.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: What size are you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I wear size forty.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Try this one on.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: It fits me very well.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: It costs ninety euros.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I'll take it. Can I pay by card?

title: Meeting a new colleague
description: It's your first day at a new job. You introduce yourself to a colleague.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Hi, I'm Maria. You're the new one, right?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, my name is Ahmad. Nice to meet you!

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Where are you from?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I come from Syria, but I've been living here for two years.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Cool! What do you do here?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I work as a software developer.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Let's have lunch together!

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Gladly! When works for you?

title: Buying a train ticket
description: You are at the Berlin train station and want to buy a ticket to Hamburg.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: How can I help you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I need a ticket to Hamburg.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: One-way or round-trip?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Round-trip, please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: When would you like to travel?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Tomorrow morning, if possible.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: The next train leaves at eight o'clock.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Perfect. From which platform?

title: Weekend plans with a friend
description: Your friend calls to discuss what to do this weekend.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Hey! What are you doing this weekend?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Nothing planned yet. Do you have an idea?

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: We could go to the movies.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Good idea! Which film is playing?

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: The new Marvel film just came out.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I've been wanting to see that for a long time!

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Shall we meet on Saturday at seven?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Sounds great. See you then!

title: Annual checkup at the GP
description: It's time for your yearly health checkup. The doctor asks about your lifestyle and runs through standard questions.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Good day, please come in.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Hello, Doctor. Thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Today we'll do your annual checkup.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, I feel pretty good.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Have you had any complaints recently?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Sometimes I have back pain after work.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: How many hours do you sit at a desk daily?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: About eight hours, sometimes more.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Do you exercise regularly?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I go jogging twice a week.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Very good. Do you smoke or drink alcohol?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: No, I don't smoke and I rarely drink.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: I'll measure your blood pressure now.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Okay, what are the values?

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Your blood pressure is completely normal.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I'm glad to hear that.

title: Job interview at a startup
description: You're interviewing for a software developer position at a Berlin startup. The interviewer asks about your background and motivation.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Welcome! Glad you have the time.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Thank you for the invitation.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Tell me a bit about yourself.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I'm a software developer with five years of experience.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Which technologies are you specialized in?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Mainly in Angular and TypeScript.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Do you have experience with teamwork?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, I enjoy working in agile teams.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Why do you want to work with us?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Your products have a big impact on the industry.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: What are your greatest strengths?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I learn quickly and enjoy solving difficult problems.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: And your weaknesses?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Sometimes I spend too much time on details.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: What salary are you expecting?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I was thinking around seventy thousand euros per year.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: When could you earliest start?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: In one month, after the notice period.

title: Opening a bank account
description: You're at a German bank to open your first checking account (Girokonto). The clerk walks you through the process.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Good morning, how can I help you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I'd like to open a checking account.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Of course. Do you have your ID with you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, here is my passport.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Thank you. Do you also have a registration certificate?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, I got it last week.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Perfect. What is your current address?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Müller street fifteen, ten-twelve Berlin.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Are you employed or a student?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I've been working in Berlin for three months.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Would you also like a credit card with it?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: No, the debit card is enough for me.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: There is a monthly fee of five euros.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: That's okay with me.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Please sign here at the bottom.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: When will I get my card?

title: Returning a defective phone
description: Your new smartphone has a problem. You return to the electronics store to get a replacement or refund.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Good day, can I help you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, I have a problem with my phone.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: What exactly is the problem?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: The battery doesn't charge properly anymore.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: When did you buy the phone?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Two weeks ago, here is the receipt.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Do you still have the original packaging?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, everything is complete.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Would you prefer money back or a new device?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Rather a new device, if possible.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: I need to check the warehouse briefly.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: No problem, I'll gladly wait.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: We have the same model in stock.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Wonderful, thank you very much for your help!
